sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمْتُ أَسَاسِيَّاتِ الْبَرْمَجَةِ فِي مَدْرَسَتِي الثَّانَوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Naučio sam osnove programiranja u svojoj srednjoj školi.
sentences.translationEn: I learned the basics of programming in my high school.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبْتُ بَرْنَامَجًا بَسِيطًا يَقُومُ بِجَمْعِ الْأَعْدَادِ التِّلْقَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Napisao sam jednostavan program koji automatski sabira brojeve.
sentences.translationEn: I wrote a simple program that adds numbers automatically.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ لُغَاتُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ أَدَاةً مُهِمَّةً لِلِابْتِكَارِ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Programski jezici se smatraju važnim alatom za inovacije u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Programming languages are considered an important tool for innovation in the future.
